agent: Instructions Generator

Take the information below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it in the /docs (for both subprojects), 
/docs/web (for nextJS) and /docs/api (for fastify) directory. If a .md filename is provided, use that, otherwise 
generate an appropriate filename based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too 
long. Make sure to update the ALL AGENTS.md files to reference this new docs file. If no information is provided below, 
prompt the user to give the necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document.
